text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the day of the NHK Mile Cup. It's a
classic-year G1 that Agnes Digital ran in last
year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! Doto! Trainer! Hi, everyone! I have
someone I'd like to show you today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What passion! Don't tell me, you're introducing us
to your fiancé?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Bwah! What?! No! It's nothing like that.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Shall we head to Tokyo Racecourse?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The four of us head out to watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the race begins, we see Agnes Digital
rooting for...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here comes number four, today's favorite! Look
at her go! She's holding down a strong lead, and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's won it! A staggering shock from overseas! I
say that the significance of this win makes her a
clear contender to be the face of the Twinkle
Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whoooa... Ooohhh...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A brilliant show and breakout performance by this
new star. She's lacking in neither wits nor
charisma.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
She's so... strong! I can't believe how amazing that
was!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! I knew it! I kneeew she was the one!
WoAooGfSjgLl!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yup, yup, yup. I called it from the beginning!
She's been popular with the other Uma simps
lately too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
With those looong strides and how she kills it on
every type of track, it's no wonder!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention those adorable eyes and long,
slender legs! I just... I just...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! You're quite smitten with her, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Absolutely. I mean, she is not like everyone else! Ohhh, and to think she just came and won the very same race I ran in before... Swoon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaah! It's like my motherly instincts have just
awoken! Do you guys mind if I go shout out some
of this affection?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital makes a break for the fence by the
track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
NUMBER FOOOUR! YOU CAN DO IT! YOU
HAVE A LONG ROAD AHEAD OF YOU, BUT I
KNOW YOU CAN DO IT! I JUST KNOW IT!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
IF EVER YOU FEEL LOST OR IF THINGS GET
HARD, US SENIORS ARE HERE FOR YOU!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She yells her heartfelt message at the top of her
lungs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, she herself has been through quite a lot
since last year's NHK Mile Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She learned about true intensity during T.M.
Opera O and Meisho Doto's first face-off at the
Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her perspective changed significantly after she
learned about King Halo's first-rate
determination in the Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now today, with the birth of a new
generation of runners, the trail of Umamusume
continues on.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Amaaashing... So preshhhush... I can't believe I'm
actually allowed inside this ring of feels...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhhgggh! Hwaaah! It's like my insides have
turned to mush...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You're possessed by euphoria! But is
it really okay for you to be so at ease?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you cannot defeat me and Doto, how can you
inspire the next generation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Or, forget about inspiring them, they may
overcome you entirely if you aren't careful. The
Twinkle Series is a stage in which the strongest
actors take the lead.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes... I'm well aware, thank you! And that's
exactly why I want to run better.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I want to outpace both you and Doto for the sake
of my classic-year cutie. And then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
After I beat the two of you, I want to welcome her
with a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: After beating—eek! ...Y-y-you're really driven...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That just means I'll—we'll—have to try harder too. I'm looking forward to this fall.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: That's right! Me too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chaser is now the chased. With this extended
cast of actors, the Twinkle Series has become an
even more colorful spectacle.
